channel.title: briefUpdatesHealthOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesHealthOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: This behavior can be a turning point for families caring for a dementia patient
item.description: Wandering, and "elopement," are frightening and dangerous behaviors by people with dementia. For some families, it is the point when they begin to see...

item.title: La respuesta del equipo de Trump a los aumentos de las primas de ACA: cobertura catastrófica
item.description: La cobertura médica y su accesibilidad se han convertido en temas políticamente sensibles de cara a las elecciones de medio término de noviembre.

item.title: Sofia Noori, Nema Health
item.description: Nema Health has cracked the code on PTSD and has an amazing study showing that their technique of intensive cognitive processing therapy is over 99% e...

item.title: Listen: Why Do I Need Prior Authorization?
item.description: When the doctor says you need a prescription or treatment, sometimes you need approval from your health insurance first. Without it, they won’t pay. H...

item.title: Trump Required Hospitals To Post Their Prices for Patients. Mostly It’s the Industry Using the Data.
item.description: Politicians have pushed for price transparency in health care. But instead of patients shopping for services, it’s mostly health systems and insurers ...

item.title: Listen to the Latest ‘KFF Health News Minute’
item.description: The "KFF Health News Minute” brings original health care and health policy reporting from our newsroom to the airwaves each week.

item.title: Primary care is in trouble. Doctors are banding together to increase market power
item.description: As costs increase, primary care practices are joining forces in Independent Physician Associations. The goal is to leverage better insurance contracts...

item.title: Is that carb ultra-processed? Here's a test even a kid can do
item.description: The latest nutrition guidelines urge Americans to avoid highly processed food. But when it comes to carbs, many people don't know which ones are ultra...

item.title: Nuevas reglas de trabajo de Medicaid podrían impactar más fuerte en adultos de mediana edad
item.description: Los adultos de entre 50 y 64 años, especialmente las mujeres, son quienes probablemente resulten más afectados por las nuevas reglas que imponen traba...

item.title: AI replaces me: The Private AI Bubble Meets the Public Digital Health Reality Check
item.description: By CLAUDE.AI trying to write like me MATTHEW HOLT I finally did what I have been wanting to do for a while and had an AI ingest everything I’ve writte...

item.title: Photos: The flying doctors of Lesotho won't let their wings be clipped
item.description: This band of airborne health workers bring essential medical care to isolated communities in the southern African nation. In addition to turbulence, t...

item.title: What the FDA's rejection of Moderna's flu shot means for the future of vaccines
item.description: The Food and Drug Administration rejected Moderna's new flu shot. This raises questions about what it means for the future of vaccine development.

item.title: Amodei Believes “AI-Enabled Autocracy” Could Be Imminent
item.description: By MIKE MAGEE Last month, Dario Amodei, CEO of Anthropic, did it again – scaring the bejesus out of societal leaders worldwide with warnings that thei...

item.title: Ten Ten Ten – Trying to radically fix health care in the US
item.description: The goal of the new non profit Ten Ten Ten founded by TJ Tedesco & Bhargav Raman is to take America from being the most expensive health system in the...

item.title: 2026: A Year for Reimagining Healthcare’s Safety Net
item.description: By JEFF BRANDES To say healthcare’s safety net experienced tectonic shifts in 2025 would be an understatement. The rapid introduction of multiple and ...
